name: Rob Dessommes - Dallas Mortgage Lender & Broker - PrimeLending A PlainsCapital Company
description_short: Senior mortgage loan officer at PrimeLending offering FHA, VA, USDA, and conventional loans across 45 states with 30+ years of industry experience.
description_long:
Rob Dessommes is a Senior Loan Consultant (NMLS #176534) at PrimeLending, A PlainsCapital Company, based in the Dallas corporate office. He has been in the mortgage industry since 1993 and with PrimeLending since 2000, having arranged over 5,000 mortgage loans throughout his career. PrimeLending itself has operated since 1986 and is owned by PlainsCapital Bank, the largest privately held bank in Texas. The company is ranked 11th among the Top 100 Mortgage Companies in America by Mortgage Executive Magazine and operates nationwide in all 50 states (excluding NJ, RI, HI, AR, and NY).

The Rob Dessommes team offers a comprehensive range of mortgage products including FHA loans (203k, 203b, streamline, Good Neighbor Next Door, Bond & Grant, HUD REO), conventional conforming and non-conforming jumbo loans, VA loans (Texas Vet Land Board, Greenbuild, 4% seller contribution), USDA rural loans, construction loans, and specialty programs like Fannie Mae HomeReady, Freddie Mac HomePossible/HomeOne, manufactured housing, student loan cash-out refinances, and down payment assistance loans. They also offer fixed and adjustable-rate mortgages across all program types.

Dessommes is specifically recognized as a loan officer who handles challenging and credit-difficult cases, with real estate agents noting his ability to secure difficult approvals. He has been recognized by D Magazine as one of DFW's leading loan officers from 2009 to 2025. The team operates extended hours (8am-9pm, 7 days per week) with underwriters working weekends. The Dessommes-Kremer team brings over 50 years of combined mortgage experience, with Stephen Kremer (NMLS #176586) serving as the Team Loan Officer.

However, this is a loan origination service dependent on current lending standards, market rates, and approval criteria. The website does not provide transparent rate quotes, actual APRs, or detailed fee structures. Consumers should expect the standard mortgage application process and should compare rates across multiple lenders before committing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Senior loan officer with 30+ years industry experience and 5,000+ mortgages arranged since 1993
Specifically known for handling challenging loans and credit-difficult borrowers, per REALTOR® feedback
Extended hours of operation (8am-9pm, 7 days/week) including weekend underwriting availability
PrimeLending ranked 11th nationally and backed by largest privately held Texas bank (PlainsCapital Bank)
Recognized by D Magazine as one of DFW's leading loan officers for 16+ consecutive years (2009-2025)
Comprehensive program offerings including FHA, VA, USDA, conventional, jumbo, construction, and specialty loans
Serves 45 states and operates with nationwide lending infrastructure and expertise
cons: Website does not provide transparent current mortgage rates or actual APR examples for comparison
No published fee schedule or cost breakdown available on the website for consumer review
Limited information about approval timelines or actual processing speed despite marketing 'simple' experience
Dependent on standard mortgage underwriting; challenging loan approvals not guaranteed despite team reputation
Does not service New Jersey, Rhode Island, Hawaii, Arkansas, or New York markets
best_for: Borrowers with complex credit histories or non-traditional mortgage scenarios seeking experienced handling
DFW-area homebuyers and refinancers who need extended availability and weekend underwriting support
VA, FHA, or USDA loan applicants requiring specialized program knowledge and expertise
Real estate professionals and agents needing a loan officer with reputation for closing difficult deals
diagnosis: Rob Dessommes is best for DFW-area borrowers and those nationwide seeking a senior loan officer with three decades of experience, particularly those with complex credit situations, non-traditional scenarios, or specialty loan needs (VA, FHA, construction). The main caveat is that while his team reputation for handling difficult loans is strong, actual approval depends on current underwriting standards, and the website lacks transparent pricing, rates, and timelines needed to evaluate this lender objectively against competitors.
services: FHA mortgages (203k, 203b, streamline, Good Neighbor Next Door, Bond & Grant, HUD REO with escrow repairs)
Conventional loans (conforming, non-conforming jumbo, Homestyle Renovation, financed mortgage insurance)
VA loans (Texas Vet Land Board, Greenbuild programs, 4% seller contribution options)
USDA loans (rural areas, financed closing costs or seller-paid options)
Construction loans (conforming and jumbo loan amounts)
Specialty programs (Fannie Mae HomeReady, Freddie Mac HomePossible/HomeOne/GreenCHOICE, Freddie Mac CHOICERenovation)
Mortgage rate quotes and calculator tools
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
